summary.business_type: Creative Studio / Visual Production Agency — Nairobi, Kenya
top_findings: Canonical tags on 13 of 14 pages reference .html URLs while server serves clean URLs — PageRank consolidation broken site-wide
www variant serves 200 OK instead of redirecting to non-www — split canonical origin, crawl budget divided
Thin content on key pages: /us (174 words), /projects/nairobi-fashion-week (122 words), homepage (321 words)
No Google Business Profile — invisible in local map pack for 'video production Nairobi' queries
No YouTube presence — YouTube correlation with AI citation is 0.737, the highest known GEO signal; studio makes video but has no YouTube channel
quick_wins: Fix canonical tags + og:url + JSON-LD URLs in one template pass (30 min) — highest ROI technical fix
Add www → non-www redirect (3 lines .htaccess, 15 min) — stops crawl budget split
Upload YouTube showreel (30 min) — unlocks highest-correlation AI citation signal
Claim Google Business Profile (1 hour) — unlocks local map pack visibility
Submit Clutch.co listing (30 min) — free DA 70+ backlink, indexed within days

categories.name: Technical SEO
what_works: LiteSpeed server with HTTP/3 (QUIC) and Brotli compression
Single-hop 301 for .html → clean URL redirects
HTTPS enforced, no mixed content
All 14 public pages return 200 OK
robots.txt valid — correctly disallows /_lab/ and template files
Sitemap declared in robots.txt
Complete favicon set
Mobile viewport meta on all pages

findings.title: Canonical tags reference .html extension URLs site-wide
findings.description: 13 of 14 pages have canonical tags pointing to .html extension URLs (e.g., /our-work.html) while the live server resolves clean URLs (/our-work). The .html URL 301-redirects to clean URL, meaning the page Google is told is canonical returns a redirect — breaking PageRank consolidation.
findings.recommendation: Update all canonical <link> tags to clean URLs. E.g.: <link rel="canonical" href="https://nairoreelproductions.com/our-work">

findings.title: JSON-LD and og:url fields reference .html extension URLs
findings.description: All non-home JSON-LD 'url' fields and og:url meta tags reference .html extension paths. Schema entities are associated with redirect URLs rather than canonical URLs.
findings.recommendation: Update all JSON-LD 'url' fields and og:url values to clean URLs in the same pass as canonical tag fixes.

findings.title: www variant serves 200 OK instead of redirecting to non-www
findings.description: https://www.nairoreelproductions.com/ returns 200 OK with the same content as the non-www version. Two canonical origins exist — crawl budget and backlinks are split.
findings.recommendation: Add as first rule in .htaccess: RewriteCond %{HTTP_HOST} ^www\.nairoreelproductions\.com [NC] / RewriteRule ^ https://nairoreelproductions.com%{REQUEST_URI} [R=301,L]

findings.title: /index.html redirects to /home instead of /
findings.description: /home is an indexable duplicate of / with no canonical pointing to /. Any link to /home does not consolidate with /.
findings.recommendation: Change .htaccess Rule 1 to redirect /index.html → / directly. Remove /home rewrite rule.

findings.title: No security headers
findings.description: No Strict-Transport-Security, X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options, or Referrer-Policy response headers. HSTS absence means HTTP connections are possible before redirect; no X-Frame-Options means clickjacking risk.
findings.recommendation: Add 4 Header always set directives to .htaccess.

findings.title: No IndexNow implementation
findings.description: /indexnow.txt returns 404. Bing and Yandex discover updates only on crawl schedule.
findings.recommendation: Generate GUID key, place key file in webroot, submit to Bing Webmaster Tools.

findings.title: Hero video poster has no preload hint
findings.description: Homepage <video poster> is the LCP candidate on initial load. No <link rel='preload'> in <head> — browser discovers it late.
findings.recommendation: Add <link rel='preload' as='image' href='assets/home/home-hero-poster.png' fetchpriority='high'> to <head>.

findings.title: Noindex page included in sitemap
findings.description: /tranzit (private production kit) has noindex,nofollow but is listed in sitemap.xml. Conflicting signals.
findings.recommendation: Remove /tranzit entry from sitemap.xml.

findings.title: All sitemap lastmod dates are identical
findings.description: All 15 URLs share <lastmod>2026-06-18</lastmod>. Google deprioritises sites where lastmod values are consistently equal.
findings.recommendation: Set per-page lastmod to actual file modification date using git log dates or filesystem mtimes.

findings.title: No preconnect hints for Cloudinary and Wistia
findings.description: No <link rel='preconnect'> for res.cloudinary.com or fast.wistia.com. First connection adds 100–300ms on mobile.
findings.recommendation: Add preconnect links to <head> of all project pages and our-work.

findings.title: main.js and fx.js lack defer attribute
findings.description: Scripts block HTML parsing even at end of body without defer.
findings.recommendation: Add defer to both script tags on all pages. Verify execution order preserved.

categories.name: Content Quality (E-E-A-T)
what_works: Named team members with job titles
Organization schema with address and areaServed
Client portfolio demonstrates real-world work (KFC, NFW, EKUC)
EKUC testimonial on /process page
All images have alt text
Tranzit project page has genuine craft-specific copy

findings.title: /us page is 174 words — critically thin
findings.description: The About page is the site's biggest E-E-A-T liability. Three team members named with titles but no prose bios. 'Our Story' is 68 words of generic language. 'Our Journey' timeline produces no readable text for crawlers.
findings.recommendation: Expand to 600–800 words. 100–150 word bio per team member (tools, skills, brands, philosophy). Rewrite 'Our Story' with specifics: founding year, first client, milestones.

findings.title: /projects/nairobi-fashion-week is 122 words — critically thin
findings.description: Two sentences for a prestige event photography project. Zero context about the event, designers, images delivered, technique, or client brief.
findings.recommendation: Expand to 400+ words: client brief, creative approach, technical execution, results/outcome.

findings.title: Homepage body copy is 321 words
findings.description: 'Featured Work' section is 6 H3 labels with zero descriptive copy. 'What We Do' is three one-sentence bullets. Google cannot assess expertise from this content.
findings.recommendation: Add 2–3 sentences per service bullet. Add a studio-intro paragraph after the hero. Target 500+ words.

findings.title: No third-party authority signals
findings.description: No press mentions, no awards, no client logo wall, no external links referencing the studio's work. Authoritativeness is almost entirely undemonstrated.
findings.recommendation: Claim Clutch.co listing, pursue KFC/NFW/EKUC backlinks, build Google Business Profile.

findings.title: Schema email uses Gmail instead of domain email
findings.description: Schema has nairoreelproductions@gmail.com; footer and contact page show hello@nairoreelproductions.com. Inconsistency undermines trust signals.
findings.recommendation: Update schema 'email' field to hello@nairoreelproductions.com.

findings.title: No phone number or physical address on site
findings.description: Local service business for 'video production Nairobi' queries needs NAP (Name, Address, Phone) consistency. No phone number appears anywhere on the site.
findings.recommendation: Add phone number to footer, contact page, schema, and Google Business Profile.

findings.title: /us meta description is 163 chars — over 160-char ceiling
findings.description: Google will truncate the meta description in SERPs.
findings.recommendation: Trim to under 160 characters.

categories.name: Schema / Structured Data
what_works: Schema present on all pages (contrary to initial assessment)
@id anchor system correctly used for graph linking
Homepage has ProfessionalService + Organization + WebSite @graph
Project pages have CreativeWork schema
areaServed, hasOfferCatalog, knowsAbout on Organization — solid local SEO foundation

findings.title: No VideoObject schema on video project pages
findings.description: Wistia-embedded videos on Tranzit and KFC pages have no VideoObject schema. This is the highest-ROI missing schema type for a video production studio.
findings.recommendation: Add VideoObject JSON-LD to Tranzit and KFC pages. Ready-to-paste code in findings/schema.md.

findings.title: No BreadcrumbList on project pages
findings.description: No breadcrumb schema on any of 7 project pages. Immediate SERP appearance improvement available.
findings.recommendation: Add BreadcrumbList to all project pages. Ready-to-paste code in findings/schema.md.

findings.title: No FAQPage schema site-wide
findings.description: FAQPage is the most direct trigger for Google AI Overview placement for service queries. Zero FAQ schema exists anywhere on the site.
findings.recommendation: Add FAQPage with 3–5 Q&As to homepage and /process. Ready-to-paste code in findings/schema.md.

findings.title: logo and Person.image are bare URL strings, not ImageObject
findings.description: Google's Rich Results validator requires ImageObject type for logo and person images. Bare URL strings will fail validation.
findings.recommendation: Wrap in {"@type":"ImageObject","url":"..."}.

findings.title: dateCreated uses year-only string instead of ISO 8601
findings.description: Project schemas have dateCreated: '2024' — not valid ISO 8601.
findings.recommendation: Update to '2024-01-01' minimum (or specific date if known).

categories.name: Performance (CWV)
what_works: LiteSpeed HTTP/3 + Brotli — strong server baseline
All images are WebP via Cloudinary f_auto,q_auto
Static HTML — no SSR latency or hydration delay
Lightbox loads w_1600 (not w_2400) — good bandwidth decision

findings.title: Hero video poster has no preload hint (LCP impact)
findings.description: Homepage LCP candidate (video poster PNG) is discovered late — no preload in <head>. On mobile this moves LCP from Good to Needs Improvement range.
findings.recommendation: Add <link rel='preload' as='image' href='assets/home/home-hero-poster.png' fetchpriority='high'> to <head>.

findings.title: No preconnect for Cloudinary or Wistia
findings.description: 100–300ms cold connection penalty on project pages with many Cloudinary images.
findings.recommendation: Add <link rel='preconnect' href='https://res.cloudinary.com'> to project page heads.

findings.title: main.js and fx.js not deferred
findings.description: Scripts block main thread during parse even at end of body without defer.
findings.recommendation: Add defer attribute to both.

categories.name: AI Search Readiness (GEO)
what_works: llms.txt present and well-formed with citable brand identity sentences
llms-full.txt present with paragraph-level project descriptions
All AI crawlers allowed by robots.txt
Content is static HTML — fully readable without JS execution
Sitemap current and complete

findings.title: No YouTube presence — highest-correlation GEO signal unused
findings.description: YouTube mention correlation with AI citation is 0.737 — the strongest known GEO signal. A video production studio has no YouTube channel. ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google AI Overviews all weight YouTube entity signals heavily.
findings.recommendation: Upload existing production showreel. Title: 'Nairoreel Productions — 3D Animation & VFX Studio Nairobi Kenya Showreel 2025'. Add YouTube URL to schema sameAs and llms.txt.

findings.title: No FAQPage schema — primary AI Overview trigger missing
findings.description: FAQPage schema is the most direct trigger for Google AI Overview placement for service queries. None exists on the site.
findings.recommendation: Add FAQPage with 3–5 Q&As targeting 'what services', 'where based', 'how long', 'cost'. Ready-to-paste code in findings/schema.md.

findings.title: No LinkedIn Company Page — Bing Copilot entity gap
findings.description: LinkedIn is Bing Copilot's primary entity confidence signal. The studio is not linked anywhere from LinkedIn.
findings.recommendation: Create LinkedIn Company Page. Add URL to schema sameAs.

findings.title: Email inconsistency in llms.txt and schema
findings.description: nairoreelproductions@gmail.com in llms.txt and schema; hello@nairoreelproductions.com in footer. AI models surface whichever appears most frequently.
findings.recommendation: Update llms.txt, llms-full.txt, and schema to use hello@nairoreelproductions.com.

categories.name: Images
what_works: All images use WebP format
All sampled images have populated alt text
Cloudinary f_auto,q_auto for format and quality optimization
Lightbox hi-res at w_1600 (not w_2400) — good bandwidth decision
fetchpriority='high' on project hero images (added in Lighthouse pass)

findings.title: No og:image:alt on any page
findings.description: og:image is specified on pages but no og:image:alt meta tag. Accessibility requirement for social cards.
findings.recommendation: Add <meta property='og:image:alt' content='[descriptive alt]'> alongside each og:image.

findings.title: No preconnect for res.cloudinary.com
findings.description: Cold connection penalty on pages with Cloudinary images.
findings.recommendation: Add <link rel='preconnect' href='https://res.cloudinary.com'> to project page heads.

phases.name: Phase 1: Critical Technical Fixes
items: Redirect www → non-www (3 lines .htaccess)
Fix /index.html redirect to / not /home
Fix ALL canonical tags to clean URLs (13 pages)
Fix ALL og:url and JSON-LD url fields to clean URLs (same pass)
Remove /tranzit from sitemap.xml
Fix schema email Gmail → domain email
Fix /us meta description to under 160 chars

phases.name: Phase 2: High-Impact Technical Wins
items: Add security headers to .htaccess
Add hero poster preload hint to homepage <head>
Add defer to main.js and fx.js on all pages
Add preconnect hints for Cloudinary + Wistia on project pages
Implement IndexNow
Fix sitemap lastmod to real per-page dates

phases.name: Phase 3: Schema Enrichment
items: Add VideoObject schema to Tranzit + KFC pages
Add BreadcrumbList to all 7 project pages
Fix logo and Person.image to ImageObject
Add FAQPage schema to homepage + /process
Add HowTo schema to /process
Fix dateCreated to ISO 8601 on all project schemas
Add SearchAction to WebSite schema

phases.name: Phase 4: Content Expansion
items: Rewrite /us page to 600–800 words with real team bios and founding story
Expand all 7 project pages to 400+ words (brief + approach + execution + outcome)
Fix email inconsistency in llms.txt and llms-full.txt
Rewrite /us body to open with brand name (AI citability fix)
Add 'video production company Nairobi' keyword to homepage body copy

phases.name: Phase 5: Visibility & Authority Building
items: Claim and verify Google Business Profile
Upload production showreel to YouTube + add to schema sameAs
Create LinkedIn Company Page + add to schema sameAs
Submit Clutch.co agency listing (free, DA 70+)
Add bio links on Vimeo + Behance
Email EKUC for production credit link
Contact KFC Kenya for vendor mention/credit
Register with Kenya Film Commission
Add dedicated service landing pages (/services/3d-animation etc.)

phases.name: Phase 6: Monitoring & Ongoing
items: Connect Google Search Console
Set up GA4 organic traffic tracking
Capture SEO drift baseline after Phase 1+2 fixes
Publish blog post: 'How much does 3D animation cost in Kenya'
Publish blog post: 'Behind the scenes: Tranzit CGI short film'
Run quarterly re-audit and update action plan
